features.title: Code Review & Foundational Improvements
features.description: First-pass code review with bug fixes, dead code removal, dark mode, new Liabilities page, and project documentation.
changes: Removed dead Sidebar.tsx (replaced by AppLayout inline sidebar)
Fixed NavLink root route with `end` prop to prevent always-active state
Moved mobile padding (pt-12) from every page into AppLayout centralised
Added dark mode toggle (Sun/Moon) in sidebar with localStorage persistence
Fixed type safety: removed `as any` casts in AssetsPage
Created LiabilitiesPage with full CRUD (mortgages, loans, credit cards, HECS)
Added Liabilities nav item to sidebar and route to App.tsx

features.title: Setup Wizard, Theme Toggle & Living Expenses Enhancements
features.description: Wizard improvements (remove home/car loan from liabilities, cash vs bank accounts, estimated monthly expenses), theme toggle in nav bar, and expanded living expense categories with custom expense support.
changes: Removed Home Loan and Car Loan from wizard liabilities quick-picks (covered in assets)
Added Cash vs Bank Account selection for cash savings with interest rate support
Replaced detailed wizard expenses step with simple estimated monthly expenses field
Added Light/Dark/Auto theme toggle to top navigation bar (desktop + mobile)
Added Other Insurance under Insurance category
Added Security, Home Improvements, Repairs & Maintenance, Gardening under Housing
Added Medical, Pharmacy, Pet Costs, School Costs under Living category
Added Accounting Fees under Financial category
Added custom expense button to create user-defined expense types
Removed number input spinners globally via CSS

features.title: Add Budget vs Actual Expense Tracking Widget to Dashboard
features.description: Integrate the existing ExpenseActualsView component into the dashboard as a widget showing budget vs actual spending by category for the current month, with traffic light indicators (green/yellow/red).

features.title: Add Debt Payoff Timeline Dashboard Widget
features.description: Add a dashboard card showing estimated payoff dates for each liability based on current repayments, with a visual timeline bar chart and a detail table highlighting which debts cost the most in interest.

features.title: Show Actual Cash Outflow (P+I) on Investment Property P&L
features.description: Add a 'Cash Outflow' summary line to investment property P&L views showing the real principal + interest payment amount alongside the tax-deductible interest figure.

features.title: Add Multi-Period Columns (Monthly/Quarterly/Yearly) to Property P&L
features.description: Update the Property P&L view to display figures across three columns — monthly, quarterly, and yearly — for all income, expense, and tax benefit line items.

features.title: Add Net Worth History Trend Tracking
features.description: Snapshot net wealth monthly (or on-demand) and store it in Supabase, then display a historical trend chart on the dashboard showing actual tracked progress over time.

features.title: Add Cashflow Waterfall Chart to Dashboard
features.description: Implement a visual waterfall chart showing Income → minus living expenses → minus loan repayments → minus property costs → Net Cashflow, using Recharts which is already in the project.

features.title: Add Named Scenario Snapshots and Side-by-Side Scenario Comparison
features.description: Allow users to save What-If scenarios as named snapshots and compare two scenarios side-by-side (e.g., 'Current' vs 'Sell property + pay down debt').

features.title: Add Income Tax Estimate Display Using Existing ausTax Module
features.description: Surface an estimated annual tax liability based on salary + rental income minus deductions using the existing ausTax.ts module, and show after-tax income on the dashboard.

features.title: Fix Mobile Responsive Layout for Property P&L Multi-Column Grid
features.description: Audit and fix the responsive layout for the property P&L monthly/quarterly/yearly column grid, implementing collapsible columns or horizontal scroll to prevent overflow on mobile.

features.title: Add CSV and PDF Export for Financial Snapshot
features.description: Allow users to export their financial snapshot as a PDF report or CSV file, useful for sharing with a financial advisor or mortgage broker.

features.title: Add Recurring Transaction Tracking
features.description: Track actual income received and expenses paid per month beyond budgets, auto-populating from expected recurring items and letting the user confirm or adjust each entry.

features.title: Add Financial Goal Setting and Milestone Progress Tracking
features.description: Allow users to set financial goals (e.g., reduce debt to $X by date, reach positive cashflow, net worth target) and display progress bars with estimated achievement dates on the dashboard.

features.title: Add Per-Property Equity Growth Chart
features.description: On the property detail page, show an equity growth chart over time reflecting property value appreciation minus mortgage amortisation, scoped to the individual property using the existing projection engine.

features.title: Show Negative Gearing Tax Benefit in Property P&L
features.description: Display the negative gearing tax benefit section in the Property P&L, including deductible loss, marginal tax rate, annual tax benefit, and an after-tax cashflow summary line.

features.title: Add Interest-Only Loan Indicators to Debt Views
features.description: Badge and visually distinguish interest-only loans in the debt payoff timeline and debt tables, showing 'IO — ∞' for payoff date and noting no principal reduction.
